name: lazytax
description: A secure CA-style companion that takes Indian taxpayers from documents to a reviewed filing.

interface.shortDescription: Your secure CA-style companion for Indian tax filing.
interface.longDescription: LazyTax takes over the tax-filing legwork: it consolidates real private documents, finds duplicate and missing evidence, prioritizes AIS, Form 26AS and prefill collection before asking questions, reconciles source records, calculates supported domestic and US-stock tax deterministically, and stays with the taxpayer through review and a consent-controlled filing handoff.
defaultPrompt: Take over my tax filing: organize these documents, find what's missing, and guide me to completion.
Collect my tax sources first, then ask only what you genuinely cannot discover.
Explain my return like a careful CA and keep working until only my approvals remain.
